\output d{11:7,12:8,13:15,14:25,15:20,16:8,17:7,18:5,19:3,20:2} - 4d((d100 <= 50 - 10 + d{-6:5,-3:10,0:10,2:15,5:20,7:15,10:10,20:10,28:3,35:2} + d{-3:10,0:15,3:35,6:20,10:10,15:10})d(d{3:14012,7:16924,20:9064}))\

output (d{11:7,12:8,13:15,14:25,15:20,16:8,17:7,18:5,19:3,20:2} - 4d((d100 <= 50 - 10 + d{-6:5,-3:10,0:10,2:15,5:20,7:15,10:10,20:10,28:3,35:2} + d{-3:10,0:15,3:35,6:20,10:10,15:10})d(d{3:14012,7:16924,20:9064}))) *1

output (d6 - 4d((d20 +d{-3,-2:9,-1:46,0:104,1:46,2:9,3} +d{-3,-2:9,-1:46,0:104,1:46,2:9,3} >= 15)d(d6))) *3
